title: Restaurant
description: Our in-house restaurant serves a curated menu of Liberian and international cuisine, prepared fresh each day using locally sourced ingredients.

title: Rooftop Bar
description: Perched at the top of the building, our rooftop bar offers panoramic city views, craft cocktails, and a carefully selected wine list — the perfect end to any evening in Monrovia.

title: Swimming Pool
description: A temperature-controlled outdoor pool surrounded by sun loungers and lush tropical planting. Open daily from 7 AM to 9 PM.

title: Conference Room
description: A fully equipped conference room accommodating up to 20 delegates, with high-speed connectivity, projection facilities, and catering on request.

title: Airport Shuttle
description: Complimentary return transfers between Roberts International Airport and Ducor Residences — available for all suite and penthouse guests, and on request for other room types.

title: Free WiFi
description: High-speed, complimentary WiFi throughout the property — in your room, the lobby, the restaurant, and all outdoor areas.

title: 24hr Reception
description: Our front desk team is available around the clock to assist with check-in, reservations, local recommendations, and anything else you need.

title: Room Service
description: In-room dining available from 6 AM to midnight, with an express late-night menu available for early morning arrivals or late-night cravings.
